## Checklist

- [ ] Traces to an approved issue/spec (SDD-1, SDD-2)
- [ ] Tests added or updated; coverage >= 80% (TEST-1, DOD-1)
- [ ] `npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm test` pass locally
- [ ] No secrets added; config via env (SEC-1, CODE-3)
- [ ] Docs updated (README / .env.example / rules.md) if affected (DOD-4)
- [ ] ADR added for any significant decision (DOD-5)
- [ ] Conventional Commit title with issue key (GIT-3)
